title: cirsium dasyphyllum
intro: Cirsium dasyphyllum, also known as the woolly thistle, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) characterized by its prickly stems and yellow or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cirsium dasyphyllum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cirsium dasyphyllum are typically made as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
